headline: Wall Street just delivered a jaw-dropping reset on Nike stock
summary: Nike (NKE) is making a habit of frustrating investors. Wall Street’s patience is being tested to no end, disappointing even the most fervent of bulls. The sportswear giant is stuck in a quagmire. The painful stretch is thanks to slow sales, more competition, and constant questions regarding the ...

headline: Should You Buy Nike Stock Before March 31?
summary: The footwear company will release its third-quarter earnings later this month.

headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is grilling several major employers, including Amazon, Target, and UPS, about their recent spate of layoffs amid tax perks to corporations.
